brief: Iran attacks Gulf countries and closes Strait of Hormuz after US strikes, while US Senator Lindsey Graham dies suddenly. Amid these geopolitical shifts, researchers publish work on AI in crime linkage, BCI clinical translation, and traditional Chinese painting analysis.
news_summary: Iran retaliates against US strikes by attacking Gulf states and closing the Strait of Hormuz; Senator Lindsey Graham's death shocks Washington. Additionally, wildfires in Spain and flooding in Missouri cause casualties.
papers_summary: Research highlights include visual analytics for missing data (ImputeViz), AI for crime linkage, clinical translation of BCI in China, and compositional analysis of traditional Chinese paintings.

en.brief: Iran attacks Gulf countries and closes Strait of Hormuz after US strikes, while US Senator Lindsey Graham dies suddenly. Amid these geopolitical shifts, researchers publish work on AI in crime linkage, BCI clinical translation, and traditional Chinese painting analysis.
en.news_summary: Iran retaliates against US strikes by attacking Gulf states and closing the Strait of Hormuz; Senator Lindsey Graham's death shocks Washington. Additionally, wildfires in Spain and flooding in Missouri cause casualties.
en.papers_summary: Research highlights include visual analytics for missing data (ImputeViz), AI for crime linkage, clinical translation of BCI in China, and compositional analysis of traditional Chinese paintings.

zh.brief: 今天，两个台风接连登陆浙江，近200万人疏散；韩国一座佛寺举办30小时静修相亲活动。
zh.news_summary: 台风巴威和另一台风接连登陆浙江，当地政府提前一周组织转移、加固门窗、撤离人员，近200万人被疏散。韩国一佛寺则推出山林静修相亲，帮助单身男女寻找爱情。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无中文论文报道。英文论文包括针对缺失数据的可视化诊断工具和AI辅助犯罪关联分析研究。

todays_image.caption: The precision of a drafting compass, used to draw boundaries and spheres of influence, contrasts sharply with the chaotic redrawing of borders and alliances in the Middle East as Iran retaliates against Gulf countries.
todays_image.source_name: National Museum of African American History and Culture
todays_image.title: Drafting compass owned by Julian Abele Cook Sr.
